55fe3c483378f6aae7590a10d51e39ed97ece50d.text: Pleased to meet you, I'm [player name]. So, what's wrong with the Council?

6b385bc0c51ad54bffe20f68b0c3d50bc8461aaa.text: Then you're just the person I'm looking for. I'm [player name]. I hear you're the one to talk to about the recent escape of Councillor Hughes.

6dcce41d94e126539a64fd43d7e7c6a0b9f2cf0e.text: Good day Unferth, I am Doctor [player name].

9b919d25c8ad970c0f8be6893c4c3b5a1c78fce8.text: A chance to uncover ancient ruins doesn't happen every day! Of course I'll help! I'm [player name] by the way. How do you plan to get in?

3f0bd4926de589f3694ae735a3aec791f3f194a2.text: Hello there. I'm [player name] and I'm looking for a man named Checkal.

6336d43a06c7b805f8aa0ff4f3bde5eaf956c675.text: Well Ramarno, I'm [player name], and you have me at a loss for words! I'd have never even imagined there would be a whole city down here.

ca2a204334b9501ab5b2586256b74e5d2cf80f99.text: [player name], and I've come to ask you about a rock.

09a6eccfed7a999b92c29759d7b5330f70513ec7.text: It's always like this... Sure, I'll help you [player name], just as soon as you get me a drink!

ecf46bccbb2203a585bffc69676344577e096c53.text: No, I'm not, I'm [player name]. As for Kaleef, I'm afraid I have some bad news about him.

4048a2f7d6608e0dc3c207063afd0d318d183a66.text: I'm [player name]. I'm a friend of the Myreque. I've come to help!

18014e1207e324b0ca7bf51b82402bec6aa09b78.text: Hmmm, never fear, [player name] is here! I'll work this out Drezel, don't you worry!

1adc5dc21c29660960611ce6677bd416585b293e.text: You must be Safalaan. My name is [player name]. I come with a very important message from Vertida.

c6fc3e9720cce7681ac0a909513059557f9e2e73.text: They call me [player name]... just [player name]. So if you're not rich in money, how am I going to get paid, assuming I agree to help you with... whatever it is you want.

f4671e93e7e6c671ac31cd25af22c0821959228a.text: I'm just [player name]. I got hired by Patzi to be a butler for this evening, alongside a lady called Adala.

5aad259c8d43dc801038cf1a518d269566671d38.text: Pleased to meet you. I'm [player name]. So you're searching for knowledge in an inn?

f5fcf9144a250681889a2ac46d19d11c7dd65031.text: I think so. The name's [player name]. You're Elias, right? You had a camp out near Uzer.

b20040d448581aea983a713404730128f0ce8a4c.text: You don't remember my name either, do you? It's [player name].

efdc002f6d879ebfa996f44096c0d32438f46c29.text: Hello there. I'm [player name]. Are you Dallas Jones?

d03c448805279ad8e59a3110106a098362ac9e7d.text: My name's [player name]. You're on Lunar Isle, in a cave.

20a64edeadffd4c09d098f9ce55bc973f6bbbe88.text: I'm [player name]. Your husband told me that some beast has been causing you both trouble. I've agreed to kill it and bring back its head!

3463d93bb00ab67740d8140e603ccedafa203dad.text: So are you going to pay up then? You owe me [#] gold coins!

8f24faa1b938cc6e0e1396a3717481c3899faf18.text: Well done, you beat me. But you still owe me [#] gold pieces.

dafaf0b4bc221732d8fbca42ae51d84e1d5aad58.text: Umm...it's me again. [player name]. I'm speaking in the drain pipe, remember?

e57fa28d7620e81ff9aaffa1f3754fa03de90518.text: Well I'm [player name]. Maybe I can help you with these cultists?

3fc32920c37727d7733bdc9857c6c5869c712351.text: I'm [player name]. Don't worry, I'm a friend. I was asked to bring you some weapons.

4f73a899ec948741e6316d2990441469f797cf2a.text: I'm [player name]. Nice to meet you Sani.

8f9c7af8fdd54da271b293dd309ce75cda884177.text: Hey! Don't call me outerlander! I'm known as the mighty [fremennik name]!

785f7995b7d72f7e00131222ecf50a3a452929ec.text: Well I will try. I am the mighty [fremennik name] after all!

e31a323b8f35071a9857583ce91e2e84771f3a7e.text: ...and [player name] is the greatest pirate who ever lived?

c79dbe9ecb0f83a133a48488502422029293a490.text: We are on a mission for King Narnode Shareen. I am [player name] and this is Flight Commander Waydar.

f6ba066e4e2df29739602460f54e8225b870ccba.text: If you ever come to [location of player-owned house], I'm not letting you into my house.

e2a6c9992840a1795d85693a91f26f84a8cd951d.text: It's me, [player name]. What are you doing out here?

c07f97fcf8cdea5d85d1cd7a3fbfb3bea1093757.text: I'm [player name] and I want to talk to you about a friend of mine, Tassie Slipcast. She says you're putting the screws on her for some loan she had from you. Is this true?

12118c417248db8e7b487b75d0020d6c333b29d4.text: My name's [player name]. King Roald sent me to find out what was going on at the temple. I take it you are Drezel?

fab2bd03c53372db0324be97ddd00536f902183e.text: Sorry I took so long, [cat name], it took a while to come up with a name for you.

55c273143c9972a0b659ed2de6062ef0050cc7e5.text: I'm afraid I only have a [item name] with me...

b6e7d3e9960b807370ddfeadc6f0bb4fe88dfaaf.text: I'm afraid I only have an [item name] with me...

e8faabc131210e6c8639e7947c20edbc50486d5b.text: I'm afraid I only have a [item 1] and a [item 2] with me...

5ea5ac565caf26f6cf6a145084f675563f0271f9.text: I'm afraid I only have an [item 1] and a [item 2] with me...

91f250bbac0682bc07f38963c727f3dd42f4d86b.text: I'm afraid I only have a [item 1] and an [item 2] with me...

953fe80a2f5e83d849d2f0fde9713c25de8a4dd5.text: I'm afraid I only have an [item 1] and an [item 2] with me...

364862447b9e4c4e1765898eb6833af586b3420f.text: Hello there, I'm [player name]. Your scouts said that I should come and see you.

7101cf35af48e9d63d7793ed83486ab3c55c3f45.text: No I'm [player name]! Lord Iorwerth said you might be able to help me.

5b032560fb763f165a9d231804cc70b8b8997b0f.text: Well I'm [player name], and I'm guessing you're the Mahjarrat I'm looking for.

830b35841b34a898f11c879de16d056b1c401505.text: However, there are some who think something more sinister is going on. If that's the case, I intend to find out. I'm [player name] and I promise I"m here to help.

c96aca13497a82fc96e3b94573cff27158985f05.text: Hello there! The name's [player name]. Who are you?

d6407a84ab84f75527d854c09663d66b36833d9a.text: Nice to meet you. I'm [player name].

8f6607378460d37a45dffa5b676afd6c55573f69.text: [vampyre name], right. Anything else I should know?

1bd3d3dbf4cd08c323496a54c2230bb321b25914.text: I'm [vampyre name]. And I'm not here to cause any trouble, thank you very much.

6c13209dcce5634b02b85b2c18f3deff2c16d012.text: Kovac... alright then. My name is [player name]. So, Kovac, what do you need help with?

d1ad7fba743081e6c9cd0c182eb2ba40d37bd800.text: I'm [player name] and this is Arianwyn.

de342cce2e9f8ba19a8976f3dccb0ff61d663327.text: Well, the press is working now, but I still have to patch [the broken sections/amount] more bits of wall.

16d3676aa15f6ca032dd764848efc9e6abce34d4.text: ... and that was how I became an honourary member the Fremennik, and was given my Fremennik name, [fremennik name].

15542487ed0434348b6e102f949338846094a4c0.text: Oh, I'm sorry. I didn't mean to offend you. I'm [player name].

ec03948ec6f4f19e2817634828f2626ef0a3c61b.text: Pleased to meet you. I'm [player name].

fad62f41f3e24e9331431a383bd506fff08f7c36.text: It's [player name], and I will save you Arrav, I promise.

8f196e86e43cad3fffdb792a5103a747b3251745.text: I'm [player name]. Your father sent me to find you. He's worried about you.

28a73f632b6d77a5ac9d7729c53a9ae055b33eec.text: Well my name is [player name], but I am known as [fremennik name] by the Fremennik. May I ask who you are?

22acde10c4338740c62a4e55e085176fe086e51b.text: I am known as [fremennik name] by those in Rellekka.

f6f6946f469591ea5cb97ea2349b706e2d04ee5d.text: Ahem. I am indeed known as [fremennik name] by those in Rellekka.

7863ae50862c9bcedddde48edbd85b7bfba6e1ec.text: I [fremennik name] swear to uphold the virtues of courage and honour.

aec2df58e8a88b46d5a756c16c020fa11685ad1c.text: I only have [2-6] votes so far.

eb49c2768c442329cf7d06118a989e8536d9646e.text: I err, I'm [player name]. I was told I was under arrest. I had a little accident on the way in here.

340e761a3c609c29a511e6ab6af2a6cf9481839a.text: Oh, well, I'm [player name]. Veldaban of the Black Guard sent me to you, you see. Said you might need some help with the statue.

38ba91884fa91437a23f4c6335bb30cc71e189bb.text: I have told the director of the [company name] that I will support their bid to be put upon the statue.

390b4a8687f3bb25ab4f2b9546dc627b4707ade4.text: Hang in there, brother, [player name] is on the case.

1ca48efafff2c361be548e2c8673b8f94998d0f2.text: I'm [player name]. I'm here investigating the possible murder of a wizard.

1073c2da96761bc9f9f04aeca3bd027d04062114.text: I choose [member's name]. This is your traitor.

786f0e12e9fcd9aa8853bd793c5c5773fd6332cd.text: Well, it looks like you have some new company now. I'm [player name], and I've been looking for you.

317b21f5258a9647f0824ee58ee930788f78ca58.text: [player name], sir. Sir Tiffy Cashien sent me.

9972b85f0a4af149b0d3e527ce7e6399d276f305.text: [player name], at yours. How are you?

06546815f502c54ef21bb1b8b854993815a63903.text: My name is [fremennik name], will you not let me through?

bf4c8a6f3699598d5e99d4398b83bfb9ebe9979e.text: I am known in these lands as [fremennik name], Your Majesty. I come in search of a quest.

fc4490c7db3b9f650e26e495cac5be2b3fe8b71b.text: My name is [fremennik name], Your Highness.

632da77efe78280d73fa663756d7c73718ca7969.text: Nice to meet you Effigy, I'm [player name]. Hold on and I'll see what I can do!

772a51158b5b01f51d05cf0ee6a3d400c38de77f.text: Don't mention it. I'm [player name]. Pleased to meet you, Floopa.

27fdd2659a19455ced956251b52b885582005a35.text: It's good to meet you. I'm [player name].

343f242cf10c13526843dffdec64b6cb38b5270d.text: All work and no play makes [player name] a dull adventurer!

7a4f246b03a0fd61d1eacdaf43949d9edc2492a1.text: [house owner] killed an abyssal demon! Cool!

6a491291f23ee9821d0d799eee0ed14dbe672975.text: Hmm, [x] [item] in [x] minutes, that sounds about alright.

652e7a4e1fe3027df01b1f50152eeb2ba2805a41.text: Hmm, [x] pieces of copper ore in [x] minutes, that sounds about alright.

5d2cc11d119f4794704245235f962819255dbee9.text: Actually, I'm still just looking for your [x] [item].

3e280aca62c4bf36d8ce6a3016b880248de94abf.text: Actually, yes, I do have your [x] [item] right here.

0514dcce6e5b138c7fc936b44f8c7f6f0643c5a7.text: Askeladden, what on Gielinor are you doing up here? And by the way, the name is [player name].

3638d1cfc643bf9b3bdbcece1112f1f476073c27.text: I'm [player name]. Please let me in.

ba43ff6506c8227508feb227bb4e062d9f931771.text: Hi... I mean, [player name] reporting, sir!

4adcbc8aa685d72cde47bc4d9f33cb23462e81f9.text: No sir, I want to stay on wave [current wave #].

a4c14434f36b10cde291a380f1f8c0a14142673e.text: I'm [player name]. I'm using my magic to communicate with you.

3f2618f63505af39689bee335287e2e9b233de0c.text: Nice to meet you Charlie, my name is [player name]. What are you doing here?

13b7d5a7a5f2832c39259d1a81ef4433a7bcbb4a.text: [house owner] must be pretty handy to have slayed that!

5c79ca835ed553835d42a14037c399c29379470a.text: I have rebuilt the statue for the [company name]!

29a7bf570a0cb9d825a66ed9f865379ce234e6e5.text: Yes, please take my gold to the city. I've got [number] pieces of ore right here.

9c37fb663364a1fe21f458ed84a329027e785ba4.text: Yeah, I can do some cooking. Well, my level's [number<20], anyway.

14fb2981e2263c80720a6e7f13a71f8a3af89c02.text: Hello, my name is [player name]. Who are you?

c59697bca687c98dd9b6dbf678b5a3088d5c527b.text: Sorry I took so long, [catname], it took a while to come up with a name for you.

6db6704c8c74c2d16b9e6452bbbafff73aefb4a4.text: I didn't actually bring [amount] flax banknotes with me.

bea4abcb7c24fb6502a2aa436a7e18dd9f10bc75.text: Oh me? I'm [player name], an adventurer... I guess.

575d27709dda65a00837787b92b6a79540286ceb.text: Yes, give me back my [amount] coins

fdf4d61851e6c5aab7e9c49c81cd4ae228d7d028.text: You too. I'm [player name]. What are you doing hanging round the Colosseum?

8a90c1d678198cdf37bd39dbe1c2c2124fc40560.text: Don't worry, I'm not an outerlander, I am [fremennik name], a Fremennik!

7f9741f9d7172318ce79b1e4da93b312bd6238a5.text: [player name] reporting for... nothing in particular, really.

e2fd589279b6b7ee12c3e5700255da226737dc74.text: Right, then... I'll get you [item] in the next [15-20] minutes. I'm on it.

8a186e90010e04042347aae367bc7f08f0271c2a.text: Right, then... I'll get you [x] [item] in the next [x] minutes. I'm on it.

3aeb7381b64a521f3c6c21a23e0915c5a0569926.text: Don't worry about it, I've got your [item] right here.

a7361f9a34996a4b994dc72ae82ffea66e347ee0.text: Am I still on time? I've got you [x] [item]!

46a77728dca70fa4875f5383aaf8c97132afdf5b.text: It's nice to meet you Gwerin, I'm [player name].

be1c57428d927dbdd1264b5b28310909366ccc6d.text: Nice to meet you too, Gwyna. My name is [player name], Captain of the [boat name].

ec3e8578fd51e94dad66286c6fa0992faafb4e73.text: Not much of a quest, but I'll do it. Just [x] [item] in [x] minutes.

2843db461e62e4427e852fb62603be3d81cc3978.text: It's [player name]. I'm using my magic to communicate to you. Don't worry.

fcfd2b4eec30bd36b14fefa161978a2920b368d2.text: Yes, along with his egg, [egg name], but there's a bit of a problem! [egg name]'s broken!

8bf63c8d2e7801be287e3ad7944d1decad418877.text: My name is [player name], and I have a couple of questions for you.

732fa5850cebb0e8e3c904ba9738c380080c162b.text: Hey, [house owner] killed the King Black Dragon!

a705b2367d4065db366ae65b043dad75ec455364.text: ... Thinking about it, I chose mine as well. I'm [player name], by the way.

3cea93a4171a171f43e7a4ad7b499a70a6cf1a17.text: I'm [vampyre name]. I was just looking around.

dbec47d144cdcb471f31a0a400d71f8ed2cc14a5.text: Nice to meet you Gura, my name is [player name].

70d3fea92dab8f5ee0d70948d58228a0f526b7ec.text: It's nice to meet you Lleidr, I'm [player name].

d98c2f3dfa4eba8ffff9b3a591ec1550458eb820.text: How about [amount of coins in inventory] gold?

feb6d68b464540508b58388da67740a59ff2c8f3.text: Pleased to meet you. I'm [player name]. So, what's wrong with the Council?

eaba706e04f28ebd10afa327bffd5ba167e92465.text: It's nice to meet you Marwolaeth, I'm [player name].

8101ea639dd9bd21c193e66e509b45e3df134853.text: It's nice to meet you Meddwl, I'm [player name].

1edd481a4ba9093ad7eb7e60325dd735b71081fc.text: [sic] Take the hammer I gave you, or buy a new one from a general store, and proceed to a nearby anvil.

b9348d0a0ab34c1c97c24c86d3412d9c39030dc6.text: [sic] By using a metal bar on an anvil you will be presented with a screen showing the objects you are able to smith at your current level.

0d571aa3a8a087a748870d03da6f39442481a893.text: [sic] It's a pretty straightforward skill as I'm sure you discovered while making me that lovely bronze dagger.

8cfd6c668fd8ae8948f1dc350c628601fde981c7.text: [sic] The higher Smithing level you are, the better quality the metal you can work with. You start off on bronze and work your way up as your smithing skills increase.

52ccfe0f27aef2691124a77e61051a9441ddbaa2.text: Thanks. My name's [player name], by the w...uh...okay, I think I need to lie down.

b4c56f2ef7e7f3c262219f5b67168e998240cae9.text: Don't worry, Murphy. My name's [player name] and I'm using magic to contact you!

0ac985dd7f01260c62a9e3c66becb4d726dd8c2d.text: Well, my name is [player name] and I'm pleased to meet you. So, now that I'm not a stranger anymore, what's your name?

08aca22e42f2ed558af105e905a9f49b7ea401aa.text: I'm [player name]. That sounds pretty important.

6063a9766af484c10e9d34d35c20c852d7cce9e9.text: I have [x] law runes and [x] pieces of molten glass here!

e8f87b59875470e0c52d114b6832e26d849e85dd.text: Right... Well I'm [player name]. What is it you do around here?

0fd960bb091b7bdf18c6e9e931baa673c430c25c.text: My name is '[player name] of Lumbridge'.

ff9f1bce442787e908b9108d388a92ad2667a960.text: My name is '[player name] of Varrock'.

501890bf8ff2f2152c502b835816ade22644bd7d.text: My name is '[player name] of Falador'.

1862a20256b5f9664bbd9a43617bb7ad20f00632.text: It's nice to meet you Preswylwyr, I'm [player name].

573825681d380e79d7cf317e8d4fd7b3c04c8d67.text: It's nice to meet you Rhoddwr, I'm [player name].

104e4888670c426d97aa76a43051bf8ac618fb76.text: Ehm... well... my name is [player name], if that rings any bell?

0660426745efdc3c9b25f234b9536b1919b97ef4.text: You wanted me to get [item], remember? Well, here you go!

591908705d5d1018dbd1970de2d78e4974d59ccd.text: Sure, got it. That's 3 [item] in the next 15 minutes, I'll get right on it.

ddcae88991c2f2bc496410f499bb462724229f6e.text: Sure, got it. That's 4 [item] in the next 15 minutes, I'll get right on it.

44cd49b9c2b5bff40d12c143bfbb5262277d52a8.text: Sure, got it. That's 5 [item] in the next 15 minutes, I'll get right on it.

ab601fa742f59ad3d09196f327ac8f4fde18353c.text: Sure, got it. That's 3 [item] in the next 20 minutes, I'll get right on it.

48b6b3541b7577652346fce49aaedb107255f658.text: Sure, got it. That's 4 [item] in the next 20 minutes, I'll get right on it.

778ce068b21bf8181065dd0b7a2c21aba8b01712.text: Sure, got it. That's 5 [item] in the next 20 minutes, I'll get right on it.

5c0af0c3ca4fa2f8ef5ff86fbed7d05b11a52099.text: Sure, got it. That's 3 [item] in the next 25 minutes, I'll get right on it.

86389fcaf889de09b14623ef036c71635b421312.text: Sure, got it. That's 4 [item] in the next 25 minutes, I'll get right on it.

f310e2a2b04f0ba0ddb90130b1de38b62ea339e2.text: Sure, got it. That's 5 [item] in the next 25 minutes, I'll get right on it.

bd1c74848cfd333245245061304664d8c39be988.text: Sure, got it. That's [x] [item] in the next [x] minutes, I'll get right on it.

124fbe3a524d7736e33ac81145359cb62619d10a.text: Right, I'll get you 3 [item] in the next 15 minutes. I can do that, yes.

c73bf144722531af90045a73b1ca0e2cd73b1aea.text: Right, I'll get you 4 [item] in the next 15 minutes. I can do that, yes.

686dd6e1a9489607ddb464ca1e7e6e19df816232.text: Right, I'll get you 5 [item] in the next 15 minutes. I can do that, yes.

05695a7712cc3b1fc2c169752e36af5dfc29a886.text: Right, I'll get you 3 [item] in the next 20 minutes. I can do that, yes.

0f66165247f1893518623dec4caf5ce01816ddf7.text: Right, I'll get you 4 [item] in the next 20 minutes. I can do that, yes.

be961a11332e0ddd11449b2d54441953d9c50e94.text: Right, I'll get you 5 [item] in the next 20 minutes. I can do that, yes.

108dbd490fec9dbdfe9709d747a78ad8a8b0156c.text: Right, I'll get you 3 [item] in the next 25 minutes. I can do that, yes.

62c3bae5340d8e73bc6047bf86e64c517af06428.text: Right, I'll get you 4 [item] in the next 25 minutes. I can do that, yes.

afab90fd3bf7044d4c1ba6ebea971efb9f6b68d7.text: Right, I'll get you 5 [item] in the next 25 minutes. I can do that, yes.

b7833f1f12db6c1543a146d078b20711268eb3f4.text: Right, I'll get you [x] [item] in the next [x] minutes. I can do that, yes.

cb675af03998795c82fd899b8e4b3de227dfc1f3.text: I'm [player name]. What are you doing all the way out here?

8cb7c97483cc128ed240bc071a7d85780b109591.text: It's very nice to meet you, Solztun! I'm [player name].

2c69064c80858a806af1762351531f5d57f08af2.text: Hi, my name is [player name]. What's wi...

1ffdda0114ebaeb5e94d7beb7aefb3ce73f78b3f.text: Hmm, [2-3] [item] in [x] minutes, that sounds about alright.

196af2fcd85d3dfc96aa9208e315b128e9ea636a.text: *Aside*Perhaps[sic] I should pay this snake charmer a visit.

724b6f003dadcc7019f104f4c7113be536aef8d0.text: So why do you want the [book]?

567c90db4c94deadd730036e7819ebbd230faf6f.text: Oh well, [tzhaar caste]-[player name] over and out.

5f41dec5a80321db4d7b7b3b98d8822c7a93a3fd.text: Hey! I'm [vampyre name]. What's your name?

be68bb3af4395b1191a233315249e0673b3fb478.text: Is this necessary? I've got a house of my own, in [city], and I've been learning about Construction for a while.

decdddf9aa858f09a64ed16523d85d243e8a097e.text: It's lovely to meet you, Bernina. I'm [player name]. How can I help you?

54c870d73fef725f3fc9f48881a78bbae8190821.text: Oh... Well I'm [player name], and I'm here because I was told there was a great treasure to be found.
